_notes.scoring: ETS GRE General Test reports Verbal Reasoning 130–170 and Quantitative Reasoning 130–170 (section-level adaptive, 27Q each). Analytical Writing 0–6 is a separate essay measure — not MCQ axes. Mock topics = Verbal + Quant with requireAllTopicsAtTarget.
_notes.bank: 350 cards (175 Verbal + 175 Quant). Timed session: 30 questions (15+15).
